summary: Tested Claimable Chat Leads and Proactive Jessi Bubble features. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Chat widget and proactive nudge verified on marketing pages. Team Inbox toggle and claim button code reviewed and verified.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/chat/leads correctly returns unclaimed chat widget conversations for user's org (line 164-229 in chat_widget.py)
POST /api/chat/claim/{conversation_id} correctly updates conversation.claimed, claimed_by, claimed_by_name, user_id (line 232-277)
Claim endpoint also updates contact.user_id to claimer's ID (line 268-275)
Already-claimed leads return 400 error as expected (line 245-246)
New chat widget conversations have channel='chat_widget', claimed=False, lead_source_name='Jessi Chat — {page}' (line 376-393)
Frontend inbox.tsx correctly fetches from /api/chat/leads for Team Inbox (line 243)
Frontend handleClaim() routes Jessi leads to /api/chat/claim endpoint (line 1008-1011)
Proactive nudge appears after 30 seconds with correct text 'Have questions? I'm here to help!' (chat-widget.js)
Nudge click opens chat, X button dismisses without opening chat (verified in code and UI test)
Nudge only shows once per session via sessionStorage 'imos_chat_nudged' flag
seed_data_creation: Test leads created during full claim flow test with unique emails like test_claim_{uuid}@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Claimable Chat Leads feature fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_chat_claim_system.py cover GET /api/chat/leads and POST /api/chat/claim endpoints. Proactive nudge verified on marketing pages - appears after 30s, click text opens chat, click X dismisses. Frontend Team Inbox toggle fetches from /api/chat/leads, claim button calls /api/chat/claim for Jessi leads.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/chat/leads?user_id={user_id}: PASS - Returns unclaimed chat widget conversations for user's org
backend_api_tests.full_claim_flow: PASS - Start chat → send messages with name+email → verify lead captured → verify in /api/chat/leads → claim → verify claimed → re-claim returns 400
backend_api_tests.lead_channel_verification: PASS - New leads have lead_source_name starting with 'Jessi Chat'
backend_api_tests.claim_updates_contact: PASS - Code review confirms contact.user_id updated on claim
backend_api_tests.lead_source_naming: PASS - Code review confirms format 'Jessi Chat — {page_name}'

frontend_ui_tests.chat_bubble_visible: PASS - Blue bubble with green pulse in bottom-right corner
frontend_ui_tests.bubble_click_opens_panel: PASS - Panel opens with Jessi greeting
frontend_ui_tests.close_button_works: PASS - X button closes panel and sets sessionStorage flag
frontend_ui_tests.nudge_click_opens_chat: PASS - Clicking nudge text opens chat panel
frontend_ui_tests.nudge_x_dismisses: PASS - Clicking X dismisses nudge without opening chat
frontend_ui_tests.handleClaim_routes_jessi_leads: PASS - Routes to /api/chat/claim for Jessi leads (line 1010)

mocked_apis.note: Uses real Emergent LLM Key for AI responses
